fields.label: Services
fields.name: services
fields.instructions: Add each service/skill card. icon_slug must match a SimpleIcons or devicon slug.

sub_fields.label: Icon Slug
sub_fields.name: icon_slug
sub_fields.instructions: Options: wordpress, woocommerce, shopify, tailwindcss, react, n8n, contentful, cpanel

default_services.name: WordPress Development
default_services.description: Expert in theme and plugin development, custom post types, and WooCommerce.

default_services.name: WooCommerce & eCommerce
default_services.description: Full-featured WooCommerce stores with payment gateways and performance optimization.

default_services.name: Shopify & Wix
default_services.description: Shopify theme development, app integrations, and Wix site builds.

default_services.name: HTML / CSS Frameworks
default_services.description: Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, and pixel-perfect responsive layouts.

default_services.name: React.js & Next.js
default_services.description: Dynamic UIs with React and SSR/SSG apps with Next.js.

default_services.name: AI & Automation
default_services.description: N8N, Make, GoHighLevel automation workflows and custom webhooks.

default_services.name: Headless CMS
default_services.description: ContentStack, Contentful with React/Next.js frontend delivery.

default_services.name: DevOps & Hosting
default_services.description: cPanel, cloud servers, ManageWP environments, DNS and deployment.
